summary: Dallas Police Department arrest records with demographic and location data. Columns include age at arrest, alias name, home address, ZIP, city, beat, height, race, and tattoo description.

Dallas Police Department unknown suspect database for open investigations. Columns include moniker, height, age class, complexion, weight, age range, build, service number ID, and primary offense code.

Dallas Police Department arrest charge records from the Records Management System (RMS). Columns include charge number, arrest book date, arrest day, NIBRS crime code, offense code, charge description, UCR code and word, and UCR offense classification.
Dallas Police Department bulk police narrative records. Columns include agency ORI, agency name, offense narrative text, service number, record date, and offense date.
Dallas Police Department 2014 bulk crime data. Columns include offense state, agency ORI, watch, gender, status, family violence indicator, business direction, signal codes, and agency name.

City of Dallas campaign finance reports tracking political contributions and expenditures. Columns include report ID, schedule type, candidate name, city council, ZIP code, geolocation, county, and council district.

Dallas Police Department 2015 response to resistance (use of force) data. Columns include officer and citizen condition types, citizen number, force type, force effectiveness, number of cycles, and officer hospital and sex data.
Dallas Police Department station locations. Columns include station name, address, phone number, ZIP code, city council district, county, and location coordinates.

Dallas Police Department 2016 response to resistance (use of force) data. Columns include force effectiveness, force type, service type, occurred date, citizen charge type, street, officer hire date, X coordinate, district name, and division.
City of Dallas garbage collection raw data for fiscal year 2012-2013. Columns include date, sanitation district, month, tons collected, and day of week.

Dallas Police Department 2014 response to resistance (use of force) data. Columns include use-of-force reason, force type, UOF number, service type, officer and civilian injury/hospital indicators, officer race and sex, current badge, and file number.

Dallas Police Department 2019 response to resistance (use of force) data. Columns include Y coordinate, citizen arrest/injury/condition/race indicators, street geocode, UOF reason, officer condition/injury, and officer sex.
Dallas City Hall website analytics for 2014. Columns include page URL, pageviews, unique pageviews, bounce rate, entrances, average time on page, and exit percentage.

Dallas Police Department 2013 response to resistance (use of force) data. Columns include citizen and officer condition types, citizen charge type, citizen sex, match address, badge, service type, street type, and division.
Dallas Police Department active calls for service with geolocation data. Columns include priority, beat, location, ZIP code, unit number, geolocation, city council district, and county.

Dallas Police Department Records Management System (RMS) vehicle data for police incidents. Columns include vehicle year, style, make, model, type, condition, date, description, verified status, and additional style description.
City of Dallas lobbyist registration data updated daily. Columns include lobbyist name, type, client name, report ID, search ID, sworn date, report description, and report link.

Dallas Police Department Records Management System (RMS) modus operandi data for offenses. Columns include incident number, entry area, MO description, property target, entry method, method of entry, and service number ID.

Dallas street cuts (utility excavations) data prior to 2013. Columns include facility name, last update date, lanes affected, contact name, fax number, start date, additional text, latitude, and job address.

Dallas Animal Services daily animal outcomes from the shelter. Columns include animal origin, council district, intake subtype/date/condition, shelter stay days, outcome date, census tract, and additional information.
City of Dallas revenues budget versus actual for fiscal year 2016-2017. Columns include fund type, fund, revenue source, budget year, department, budget amount, and actuals.

Dallas Animal Services animal inventory for fiscal year 2019-2020. Columns include activity number, animal origin, intake and outcome dates/times, outcome type, chip status, tag type, activity sequence, kennel status, and intake condition.

City of Dallas Source CD council district boundaries GIS dataset as of July 2020. Columns include council person, council number, district, comments, object ID, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

Dallas Animal Services animal field data for fiscal year 2019-2020. Columns include service request number, activity type, priority, status, quantity, street number/direction, Mapsco reference, and activity details.
City of Dallas app content messages from 2013. Columns include text and title.
City of Dallas website rotating image banner content. Columns include image, title, link, order, and story.
City of Dallas website home page stories content. Columns include sort order, title, link, background, data number, data type, image, description, and icon.
Dallas bike trails GIS dataset. Columns include facility type, status, location, limits, implementation year, length in miles, shape length, object ID, and geometry.

Dallas 311 service requests for fiscal year 2017-2018 filtered to bike-related requests. Columns include service request type, created/updated date, priority, method received, city council district, address, department, and estimated response time.

Dallas open container zone GIS boundaries from Sustainable Development and Construction zoning data. Columns include action date, development code, ordinance number, district type, notes, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

Dallas Police Department 2016 response to resistance (use of force) GIS shapefile with location data. Columns include occurred date, citizen arrest/injury, street, division, officer injury, officer sex, sector, district name, and geometry.

Dallas dry overlay zoning designation GIS data from Sustainable Development and Construction. Columns include case number, ordinance number, resolution number, effective date, council date, unique ID, notes, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

Dallas deed restrictions GIS dataset from Sustainable Development and Construction. Columns include effective date, deed restriction type, ordinance number, resolution number, council date, posted status, notes, shape area, shape length, and geometry.
City of Dallas website applications listing. Columns include name, link, description, image, and sort order.

Dallas development flags GIS dataset from Sustainable Development and Construction. Columns include posted by, notes, location, moratorium status, expiration date, requester, post date, council date, shape area, and shape length.

Dallas Animal Services daily animal intake records. Columns include kennel number, activity sequence, kennel status, intake time, animal breed, due-out date, impound number, total intake, receipt number, and additional information.
City of Dallas alley GIS dataset. Columns include alley name, is-alley indicator, and geometry.

Dallas deed restrictions GIS dataset from Sustainable Development and Construction (duplicate). Columns include effective date, deed restriction type, ordinance number, resolution number, council date, posted status, notes, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

City of Dallas parcel and appraisal data for certified roll year 2015. Columns include unit ID, taxpayer address, school district, Mapsco grid, legal description lines, street name, residential/commercial classification, and property class.

Dallas Police Department 2013 response to resistance (use of force) GIS shapefile. Columns include reporting area, officer and civilian injury/hospital, citizen/officer race and sex, division, street geocode, and Taser cycle count.

City of Dallas parcel and appraisal data for certified roll year 2016. Columns include street name, taxpayer name, business name, total exemption amount, property name, building class, city, taxpayer address lines, and geometry.

Dallas 311 service requests for fiscal year 2018-2019 filtered to bike-related requests. Columns include service request due date, lat/long value, estimated response time, priority, address, city council district, created date, status, and closed date.

Dallas Market Value Analysis shapefile showing residential housing market conditions by Census Block Group. Columns include GEOID, market value analysis cluster, median sales price, percent of homes owner-occupied, foreclosure rate, rehabilitation permits, and various housing market indicators.
City of Dallas city limits GIS boundary including Park Cities and Cockrell Hill polygons. Columns include city name, shape area, shape length, and geometry.
HUD Housing Choice Voucher (Section 8) data for census tracts within Dallas. Columns include GEOID, tract number, state, county, HCV percentage of renters, HCV public count, and geometry.

City of Dallas streets GIS polyline dataset with address range components for all street segments. Columns include full street name, prefix, suffix, left/right row, address ranges, postal codes, altitude levels, cost, and geometry.
City of Dallas service areas GIS boundaries for city divisions. Columns include area number, division name, coordinator name, phone, email, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

Dallas SH (Significant Hill) overlay zoning designation GIS data. Columns include SH overlay code, ordinance number, resolution number, effective date, case number, council date, notes, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

Dallas zoning grid reference GIS data from Sustainable Development and Construction. Columns include grid number, grid name, general location, comments, mapbook reference, shape area, perimeter, shape length, date, and geometry.

City of Dallas current floodplain GIS data from FEMA flood maps. Columns include flood zone designation, SFHA indicator, area, velocity, V-datum, depth revert, source citation, shape length, and geometry.
City of Dallas designated truck routes GIS dataset. Columns include street name, prefix, suffix, type, extent, truck route designation, object ID, shape length, and geometry.
Dallas Police Department Enhanced Problem-Solving Initiatives Coordination (EPIC) focus area boundaries GIS dataset. Columns include area name, shape area, shape length, and geometry.

City of Dallas 2011 council district boundaries GIS dataset with 2010 Census demographic data. Columns include district number, total population, White alone population counts (2010), object ID, shape area, and geometry.

Dallas grocery store locations as of February 2014. Columns include store name, address, city, status, and geometry.
